Confidential internal memo — Akagawa Precision K.K. board briefing re APPI/My Number handling and prospective tender offer under FIEA.
The Board reviewed a proposed friendly acquisition of Kumori Systems K.K. via cash tender offer at a preliminary price of JPY 2,450 per share; intended launch in late Q3 subject to valuation deliverables and special committee approval.
Under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act, these tender-offer facts are undisclosed and constitute material non-public information; circulation is restricted to directors and the deal team only.
Ms. Aki Tanabe (HR) — My Number: 1234-5678-9012 (checksum invalid; do not store in board materials), mobile 090-8061-3344, email aki.tanabe@akagawa-kk.example.jp.
Residential address (for payroll): 179-9999 Harukawa-ken, Nishihana-shi, Sakura 2-3-5; store via secure HRIS only and exclude from deal binder.
Akagawa Precision K.K. Hojin Bango (Corporate Number): 2749-0381-56231; internal reference for counterpart KYC and tax filings.
Treasury settlement channel: Torinaga Bank Nishihana Branch, Futsu-koza (Ordinary Account) No. 456-7890123; finance queries to finance@akagawa-kk.example.jp.
Mr. Kenji Okada (CFO) — Passport No. JA8923451 for onboarding with domestic securities broker; copy retention limited to KYC archive per APPI.
Public helpline 0120-000-000 is a general citizen hotline; do not list as a deal contact or in investor relations notices.
Form placeholder fields may appear on draft attachments (Name: __________, Address: __________, Tax ID: __________); remove or mask before board circulation; attendees included Chairperson, HR Lead, and Legal Counsel.
Local government vendor registration for property tax remittance: Nishihana City Office code NCO-77-221; confirm no prefectural tax arrears prior to launch.
Per APPI/My Number, individual codes must be segregated, minimized, and encrypted; payroll retains source data, while board packets contain only role-level summaries.
FIEA compliance: tender-offer facts (price range, counterparty identity, financing terms, schedule) remain embargoed; implement blackout and insider list updates for all deal participants.
Note: The scheduled public product showcase on 15 July is purely marketing and not a material fact under FIEA; it may be disclosed via routine channels without restriction.
